def positive_test_mutates_module_global_without_restore():
    rule_id = "test_mutates_module_global_without_restore"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Test mutates a module-level global variable without restoring it in teardown, leaking state."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
